flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Oconee Fall Line Technical College rose 30% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.0k → $6.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oconee Fall Line Technical College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $3.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Oconee Fall Line Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (41.7% vs 48.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oconee Fall Line Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (12.2% → 0.0%).
